commit.subject: LU-20010 tests: fix and rename sanity/56aa
commit.message:
LU-20010 tests: fix and rename sanity/56aa

Rename sanity test test_56aa to test_56Aa.

Fix the file size threshold in test_56Aa from +8k to +7k
to correctly detect files created under the striped directory.

Added an exception entry in lustre/tests/except/sanity.56aa.ex
to skip test 56aa for older clients, as they will fail when run
against a newer MDS.

Change-Id: I406c29a02116864656e88b525f2d40805fdfb94d
Signed-off-by: Akash B <akash-b@hpe.com>
